## Resource types

### <a name="warewulf_image"></a>`warewulf_image`

warewulf_image { 'foo':
  ensure => 'present',
}

This type provides Puppet with the capabilities to manage Warewulf images.

#### Properties

The following properties are available in the `warewulf_image` type.

##### `ensure`

Data type: `Enum[present, absent]`

Whether this warewulf_image should be present or absent on the target system.

Default value: `present`

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `warewulf_image` type.

* [`name`](#-warewulf_image--name)
* [`oci_repository_url`](#-warewulf_image--oci_repository_url)

##### <a name="-warewulf_image--name"></a>`name`

namevar

Data type: `String`

The name of the Warewulf image.

##### <a name="-warewulf_image--oci_repository_url"></a>`oci_repository_url`

Data type: `String`

The OCI repository url.
